        '    Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
        '    Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
        '    Serial_Printer.Open()

        'Catch ex As Exception

        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Printer  Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        'End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool2.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL2
            Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool2.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool2 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL2)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            ' Belt code for barcode verification
            Try
                OptionBeltCode = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionBeltCode").Value & "")
            Catch ex As Exception
                OptionBeltCode = ""
            End Try
            BeltScanVerified = False

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ2AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ2AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                DO_ON(5)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 4.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
            Trd4.IsBackground = True
            Trd4.Start()
        End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim sRecvData2(200) As String
        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While 1

            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56

            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then

                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool.ReadByte
                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
                        sRecvCount2 = 0
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData1(27) & sRecvData1(28))) / 1000

                        Try

                            If wStep = 4 Then
                                TQ_VALUE2 = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData2(27) & sRecvData2(28))) / 1000
                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        For i = 0 To 200
                            sRecvData2(i) = ""
                        Next
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    End If

                End If

            End If

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub BarcodePrint()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDB()

        Dim strSQL As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TableMainRH SET " &
                   "JA02_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                   "JA02_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                   "JA02_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                   "JA02_TQ1 = '" & srcTQ1Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA02_TQ2 = '" & srcTQ2Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA02_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'" &
                   " WHERE LineSerial = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String

    Sub SerialOpen()


        Try
            If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Module.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_MODULE
            Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Module.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_MODULE)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        Serial_Printer.Close()
        '    End If
        '    Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
        '    Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
        '    Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
        '    Serial_Printer.Open()

        'Catch ex As Exception

        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Printer  Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        'End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool2.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL2
            Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool2.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool2 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL2)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            ' Belt code for barcode verification
            Try
                OptionBeltCode = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionBeltCode").Value & "")
            Catch ex As Exception
                OptionBeltCode = ""
            End Try
            BeltScanVerified = False

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click

        FrmPart.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            ' Belt barcode verification step
            If OptionBeltCode = "" Then
                ' No belt code configured — skip verification
                BeltScanVerified = True
                wStep = 4
            Else
                label_Message.Text = "Scan Belt Barcode. [" & OptionBeltCode & "]"
                wStep = 3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            ' Waiting for belt barcode scan (handled in Serial_Scanner_DataReceived)

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ2AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ2AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                DO_ON(5)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 4.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
            Trd4.IsBackground = True
            Trd4.Start()
        End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim sRecvData2(200) As String
        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While 1

            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56

            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then

                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool.ReadByte
                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
                        sRecvCount2 = 0
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData1(27) & sRecvData1(28))) / 1000

                        Try

                            If wStep = 4 Then
                                TQ_VALUE2 = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData2(27) & sRecvData2(28))) / 1000
                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        For i = 0 To 200
                            sRecvData2(i) = ""
                        Next
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    End If

                End If

            End If

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim sRecvData2(200) As String
        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While 1

            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56

            If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then

                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool2.ReadByte
                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
                        sRecvCount2 = 0
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData1(27) & sRecvData1(28))) / 1000

                        Try

                            If wStep = 4 Then
                                TQ_VALUE2 = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData2(27) & sRecvData2(28))) / 100
                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
                                If srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ2_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ2_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
                                        srcTQ2Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ2Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        For i = 0 To 200
                            sRecvData2(i) = ""
                        Next
                        Serial_Tool2.DiscardInBuffer()

                    End If

                End If

            End If

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    Sub SerialOpen()


        Try
            If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Module.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_MODULE
            Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Module.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            DO_ON(5)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 4.1
            'End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub BarcodePrint()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDB()

        Dim strSQL As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TableMainLH SET " &
                   "JA02_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                   "JA02_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                   "JA02_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                   "JA02_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'" &
                   " WHERE LineSerial = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        Try

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .Cols = 4

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = "No."
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            DO_ON(5)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 4.1
            'End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        'If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
        '    Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        '    Trd3.IsBackground = True
        '    Trd3.Start()
        'End If

        'If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
        '    Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
        '    Trd4.IsBackground = True
        '    Trd4.Start()
        'End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim sRecvData2(200) As String
        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While 1

            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56

            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then

                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool.ReadByte
                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
                        sRecvCount2 = 0
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData1(27) & sRecvData1(28))) / 1000

                        Try

                            If wStep = 4 Then
                                TQ_VALUE2 = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData2(27) & sRecvData2(28))) / 1000
                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        For i = 0 To 200
                            sRecvData2(i) = ""
                        Next
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    End If

                End If

            End If

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            ' Belt code for barcode verification
            Try
                OptionBeltCode = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionBeltCode").Value & "")
            Catch ex As Exception
                OptionBeltCode = ""
            End Try
            BeltScanVerified = False

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

        FrmPart.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            DO_ON(5)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 4.1
            'End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        'If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then

        'If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then

        'End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim sRecvData2(200) As String
        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While 1

            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56

            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then

                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool.ReadByte
                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
                        sRecvCount2 = 0
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData1(27) & sRecvData1(28))) / 1000

                        Try

                            If wStep = 4 Then
                                TQ_VALUE2 = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData2(27) & sRecvData2(28))) / 1000
                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        For i = 0 To 200
                            sRecvData2(i) = ""
                        Next
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    End If

                End If

            End If

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub BarcodePrint()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDB()

        Dim strSQL As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TableMainLH SET " &
                   "JA02_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                   "JA02_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                   "JA02_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                   "JA02_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'" &
                   " WHERE LineSerial = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .Cols = 4

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = "No."
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

            End If

            Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Module.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_MODULE)
        End Try

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            ' Belt code for barcode verification
            Try
                OptionBeltCode = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionBeltCode").Value & "")
            Catch ex As Exception
                OptionBeltCode = ""
            End Try
            BeltScanVerified = False

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function
