    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            ' Belt barcode verification step
            If OptionBeltCode = "" Then
                ' No belt code configured — skip verification
                BeltScanVerified = True
                wStep = 4
            Else
                label_Message.Text = "Scan Belt Barcode. [" & OptionBeltCode & "]"
                wStep = 3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then

            ' Waiting for belt barcode scan (handled in Serial_Scanner_DataReceived)

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.Text = "OK"
            '    srcTQ2AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            'End If

            'If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
            DO_ON(5)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 4.1
            'End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        'If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
        '    Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        '    Trd3.IsBackground = True
        '    Trd3.Start()
        'End If

        'If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
        '    Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
        '    Trd4.IsBackground = True
        '    Trd4.Start()
        'End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim sRecvData2(200) As String
        Dim sRecvCount2 As Integer = 0
        Dim TQ_VALUE2 As Double = 0
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While 1

            ' 01 80 03 01 07 01           0D 09 42   01 F7 09 42   09 2F 01 F4                      19  52  25    32  AE 01 78  72  70  27  43            1D    1D          94                                 56

            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then

                Incoming2 = Serial_Tool.ReadByte
                If Incoming2 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData2(sRecvCount2) = Dec2Hex(Incoming2)
                    sRecvCount2 = sRecvCount2 + 1
                    If sRecvCount2 >= 132 Then
                        sRecvCount2 = 0
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = sRecvData1(5) & "/" & sRecvData1(23) & "/" & sRecvData1(24) & "/" & sRecvData1(27) & "/" & sRecvData1(28)
                        'Label_Tool1.Text = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData1(27) & sRecvData1(28))) / 1000

                        Try

                            If wStep = 4 Then
                                TQ_VALUE2 = CDbl(Hex2Dec(sRecvData2(27) & sRecvData2(28))) / 1000
                                'label_tool2.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                'If TOOL2_COUNT < TOOL2_NUM Then
                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    If TQ_VALUE2 >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And TQ_VALUE2 <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And sRecvData2(5) = "01" Then
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Value.Text = TQ_VALUE2
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        For i = 0 To 200
                            sRecvData2(i) = ""
                        Next
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    End If

                End If

            End If

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

        FrmPart.Show()

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                DO_ON(5)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 4.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep = 4 Then

                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    srcTQ1Value.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And ToolData <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                ElseIf srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    srcTQ2Value.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And ToolData <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

                   "JA03_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                   "JA03_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                   "JA03_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                   "JA03_TQ1 = '" & srcTQ1Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA03_TQ2 = '" & srcTQ2Value.Text & "'," &

        Connection_Close()

        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)

        Dim i As Integer
        With GridName

            'GridName.Visible = False
            .AutoRedraw = False
            .AllowUserPaste = FlexCell.ClipboardDataEnum.Text
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.Columns
            .AllowUserSort = True
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .ExtendLastCol = True
            .SelectionMode = FlexCell.SelectionModeEnum.ByCell
            .SortIndicatorColor = Color.White
            .BoldFixedCell = False
            '.AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .Cols = 4

            .Column(0).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            .Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 60
            .Column(2).Width = 80
            .Column(3).Width = 100

            .Rows = 1
            .DefaultRowHeight = 0

            For i = 0 To .Rows - 1
                .Cell(i, 0).Text = ""
                .Cell(i, 1).Text = "No."
                .Cell(i, 2).Text = "I/O"
                .Cell(i, 3).Text = "Dec."
            Next

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()


        Try
            If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Module.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_MODULE
            Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Module.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_MODULE)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        Serial_Printer.Close()
        '    End If
        '    Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
        '    Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
        '    Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
        '    Serial_Printer.Open()

        'Catch ex As Exception

        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Printer  Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        'End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        Serial_Tool2.Close()
        '    End If
        '    Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL2
        '    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

        FrmPart.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                DO_ON(5)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 4.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep = 4 Then

                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    srcTQ1Value.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And ToolData <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                ElseIf srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    srcTQ2Value.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And ToolData <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub BarcodePrint()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDB()

        Dim strSQL As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TableMainRH SET " &
                   "JA03_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                   "JA03_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                   "JA03_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                   "JA03_TQ1 = '" & srcTQ1Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA03_TQ2 = '" & srcTQ2Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA03_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'" &
                   " WHERE LineSerial = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick

        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

    Sub SerialOpen()


        Try
            If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Module.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_MODULE
            Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
            Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Module.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_MODULE)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    If Serial_Printer.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        Serial_Printer.Close()
        '    End If
        '    Serial_Printer.PortName = PortNumber_PRINTER
        '    Serial_Printer.BaudRate = 9600
        '    Serial_Printer.DataBits = 8
        '    Serial_Printer.Open()

        'Catch ex As Exception

        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Printer  Fail " & PortNumber_PRINTER)
        'End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool.Open()
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        Serial_Tool2.Close()
        '    End If
        '    Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL2
        '    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
        '    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
        '    Serial_Tool2.Open()

        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Tool2 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL2)
        'End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()

        If wStep = 1 Then

            '2021 01 25 0001 88888-00000AAA
            If Len(Label_Scanner.Text) = 26 Then
                InitControl()
                frmimage.Close()
                srcSerialNumber.Text = Label_Scanner.Text
                LoadPArt(Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(Label_Scanner.Text, 14))
            Else

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcPartNo.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)
            OptionPosition = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionPosition").Value)
            OptionRemote = Rs.Fields("OptionRemote").Value

            ' Damper assembly option: USE or SKIP
            Try
                OptionDamper = Trim(Rs.Fields("OptionDamper").Value & "")
                If OptionDamper = "" Then OptionDamper = "USE"
            Catch ex As Exception
                OptionDamper = "USE"
            End Try

            If OptionPosition = "LH" Then
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(0)
                DO_ON(1)
            ElseIf OptionPosition = "RH" Then
                srcRH.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcLH.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_ON(0)
                DO_OFF(1)
            End If

            If OptionRemote = True Then
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.Black
                DO_ON(3)
            Else
                srcRemote.BackColor = Color.White
                DO_OFF(3)
            End If
            DO_ON(4)
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 2

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(ByVal str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function


    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "1"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num As Integer)

        If num <= 15 Then
            Mid$(D_OutString, num + 2, 1) = "0"
            OUT_LABEL(num).BackColor = Color.White
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming1)
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    'S0010000010000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000E
                    '32 32 2
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                                D_Value(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function CreateSerial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM TableMainRH WHERE JA01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            Else
                IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            End If
        Next i

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        Label_Step1.Text = wStep
        'Label_Step2.Text = rStep & " " & rCount
        'Label_Count.Text = wCount
        'Label_Step3.Text = eStep

        If D_Value(1) = 1 And wStep <> 0 Then
            rStep = 1
        ElseIf rStep = 1 Then
            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            rStep = 2
        ElseIf rStep = 2 Then
            InitControl()
            wStep = 0
            rStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If D_Value(0) = 1 Then
                label_Message.Text = "Scan the Part Barcode."
                wStep = 1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '스캔완료

            frmimage.Close()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                srcTQ1AllDEc.Text = "OK"
                srcTQ1AllDEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
            End If

            If srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK" Then
                DO_ON(5)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 4.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            'BarcodePrint()
            SaveDB()
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If D_Value(2) = 1 Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DO_ON(6)
                DO_WRITE()
                wStep = 6
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            InitControl()
            frmimage.Show()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            For i As Integer = 0 To 7
                DO_OFF(i)
            Next
            DO_WRITE()
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        InitControl()
        Control2Arry()
        Init_Grid(Grid1)
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        D_OutString = "S" & "00000000" & "E"

        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            DO_OFF(i)
        Next

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then

            DO_WRITE()
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Timer1.Interval = 100
            Timer1.Start()

        End If

        If Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        InitControl()

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        frmimage.Show()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep = 4 Then

                                If srcTQ1Dec.Text <> "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    srcTQ1Value.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And ToolData <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ1Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ1Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                ElseIf srcTQ1Dec.Text = "OK" And srcTQ2Dec.Text <> "OK" Then
                                    srcTQ2Value.Text = ToolData
                                    If ToolData >= Basic_TQ1_MIN And ToolData <= Basic_TQ1_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "OK"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                    Else
                                        srcTQ2Dec.Text = "NG"
                                        srcTQ2Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                        NG()
                                    End If

                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function Hex2Dec(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Try
            tmp = CDbl("&H" & str)
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)

    Private Sub BarcodePrint()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveDB()

        Dim strSQL As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TableMainRH SET " &
                   "JA03_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                   "JA03_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                   "JA03_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                   "JA03_TQ1 = '" & srcTQ1Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA03_TQ2 = '" & srcTQ2Value.Text & "'," &
                   "JA03_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "'" &
                   " WHERE LineSerial = '" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_Tool_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles tmr_Tool.Tick

        If Tool_Connection = False Then
            Tool_Connection = True
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        ElseIf Tool_Connection = True Then
            Serial_Tool.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") &
            Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

Imports System.Data.OleDb

Public Class FrmPart

    Private mstrDatabase As String
    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    Private myDataSet As DataSet

    Public Sub New()

        ' 디자이너에서 이 호출이 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()

        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하세요.

        SetDataBinding()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SetDataBinding()

        Dim i As Integer
        GetDataSet()

        'grid3.NullText = ""
        'grid3.AllowUserSort = True
        'grid3.SortIndicatorStyle = FlexCell.SortIndicatorStyleEnum.Light3D

        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
        'Grid2.ExtendLastCol = True
        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_PART")

        Grid1.Column(0).Width = 10
        Grid1.Column(1).Width = 0
        Grid1.Column(2).Width = 110
        Grid1.Column(3).Width = 200
        Grid1.Column(4).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(5).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(6).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(7).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(8).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(9).Width = 80
        Grid1.Column(10).Width = 80


        Grid1.Column(1).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(2).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(3).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(4).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(5).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(6).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(7).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(8).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(9).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Grid1.Column(10).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter


        Grid1.Column(5).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        Grid1.Column(6).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        Grid1.Column(7).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        Grid1.Column(8).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox
        Grid1.Column(9).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.ComboBox

        'Grid1.ComboBox(1).Locked = True
        'Grid1.ComboBox(2).Locked = True
        'Grid1.ComboBox(3).Locked = True

        'Grid2.ComboBox(13).Items.Add(CStr(i)) 'HGT / NON HGT
        Grid1.ComboBox(5).Items.Add("LH")
        Grid1.ComboBox(5).Items.Add("RH")

        Grid1.ComboBox(6).Items.Add("MNL")
        Grid1.ComboBox(6).Items.Add("EMC")
        Grid1.ComboBox(6).Items.Add("IMS")

        Grid1.ComboBox(7).Items.Add("SUSP")
        Grid1.ComboBox(7).Items.Add("L/SUPT")

        Grid1.ComboBox(8).Items.Add("NONE")
        Grid1.ComboBox(8).Items.Add("SAB")

        Grid1.ComboBox(9).Items.Add("NONE")
        Grid1.ComboBox(9).Items.Add("VENT")

    End Sub

    Private Sub GetDataSet()

        Dim conn As OleDbConnection

        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_PART ORDER BY LEN(PART_NO),PART_NO"

        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"

        conn = New OleDbConnection
        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
        conn.Open()
        myDataSet = New DataSet

        myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_PART")
        conn.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_Grid()

        Dim intTopRow, intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol As Integer
        Dim myCommandBuilder As System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder

        'End the current edit operation
        Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()

        'Command
        myCommandBuilder = New System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder(myDataAdapter)
        myDataAdapter.DeleteCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetDeleteCommand()
        myDataAdapter.UpdateCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetUpdateCommand()
        myDataAdapter.InsertCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetInsertCommand()

        Try
            'Save to database
            myDataAdapter.Update(myDataSet.Tables("Table_Part"))
        Catch ex As Exception
            myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
            Return
        End Try

        myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
        myDataSet.Dispose()
        myDataAdapter.Dispose()

        'Grid status
        intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
        intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col

        'Re-bind
        Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
        SetDataBinding()
        Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
        Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
        Grid1.Refresh()

        MsgBox("Save Complete.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Sub Part_Print(str1 As String, str2 As String)

        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "60" & "," & "60" & "^BY5^BXN," & "7" & "," & "200" & ",,,,^FH^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "170" & "," & "60" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "170" & "," & "120" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str2 & "^FS")
        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub


    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click


        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_PArt ORDER BY LEN(PART_NO),PART_NO", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            i = 1
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Part_Print(Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value, Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value)
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        Save_Grid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmPart_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        txtSABTQMAX.Text = BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX
        txtSABTQMIN.Text = BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN
        txtSABTQUnit.Text = BASIC_SAB_TQ_UNIT

        txtSABRESISTMAX.Text = BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX
        txtSABRESISTMIN.Text = BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN

        txtTQMAX.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX
        txtTQMIN.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN
        txtTQUNIT.Text = BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_UNIT

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click
        BASIC_SAB_TQ_MAX = CDbl(txtSABTQMAX.Text)
        BASIC_SAB_TQ_MIN = CDbl(txtSABTQMIN.Text)
        BASIC_SAB_TQ_UNIT = CStr(txtSABTQUnit.Text)
        BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX = CDbl(txtSABRESISTMAX.Text)
        BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN = CDbl(txtSABRESISTMIN.Text)

        BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MAX = CDbl(txtTQMAX.Text)
        BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_MIN = CDbl(txtTQMIN.Text)
        BASIC_MOTOR_TQ_UNIT = CStr(txtTQUNIT.Text)
        Save_BASIC_Data()
    End Sub
End Class

input.content:
# NX4C ASS Part Master 설정 가이드

> 현장 담당자용 — 옵션 값 변경으로 대응 가능한 항목 안내

---

## 1. FRT (Front Back) Part Master 설정

### 1.1 진입 방법

각 스테이션(JA01 ~ JA04)에서:
1. 메인 화면 → **Part** 버튼 클릭
2. FrmPart 화면이 열리면 Grid에서 직접 편집
3. 편집 후 **저장** 버튼 클릭

### 1.2 주의사항

- FRT는 **각 스테이션(JA01~JA04)마다 로컬 DB(DB.mdb)** 를 사용합니다.
- JA01에서 Part 정보를 변경해도 JA02~JA04에는 반영되지 않습니다.
- **모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 설정**해야 합니다.

### 1.3 옵션 컬럼 설명

| 컬럼명 | 화면 표시 | 설명 | 가능한 값 |
|--------|----------|------|----------|
| OPTION_LHRH | LH/RH | 조향 방향 | `LH`, `RH` |
| OPTION_RECL | 리클 | 리클라이너 타입 | `MNL` (수동), `EMC` (전동), `IMS` |
| OPTION_LSUPT | L/SUPT | 럼버서포트 타입 | `SUSP` (서스펜션), `L/SUPT` (럼버서포트) |
| OPTION_SAB | SAB | SAB 조립 여부 | `SAB` (조립), `NONE` (미조립) |
| OPTION_VENT | 통풍 | 통풍시트 여부 | `VENT` (통풍), `NONE` (미장착) |
| OPTION_CARTYPE | 차종 | 바코드 출력 차종코드 | 차종 문자열 (예: `NX4C`, `OE` 등) |
| OPTION_cSAB | CSAB | CSAB 조립 여부 | `1` (조립), `0` (미조립) |

### 1.4 수정 요청별 설정 방법

#### (1) OE 바코드 차종 출력 문제

**증상**: 품번/품명은 변경되었으나, 바코드에 OE 차종으로 출력됨

**해결**: 해당 품번의 `OPTION_CARTYPE` 값을 확인/수정
- FrmPart 열기 → 해당 품번 행 찾기 → OPTION_CARTYPE 컬럼 수정 → 저장
- 예: `OE` → `NX4C` 또는 올바른 차종코드로 변경
- **JA01~JA04 모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 변경 필요**

#### (2) OE 차종 SAB/CSAB 조립 삭제

**증상**: OE 차종에서 SAB, CSAB 조립 공정이 진행됨 (불필요)

**해결**: 해당 OE 품번의 옵션 값 변경
- `OPTION_SAB` → `NONE` (SAB 조립 건너뜀)
- `OPTION_cSAB` → `0` (CSAB 조립 건너뜀)
- JA02 스테이션의 FrmPart에서 설정 (JA02가 SAB/CSAB 담당)

#### (3) 럼버서포트 4개 품번 작동 불가

**증상**: 아래 4개 품번에서 럼버서포트가 작동하지 않음
- 88310-N8AB0NNB
- 88310-N8660NNB
- 88310-N8690NNB
- 88310-N8AE0NNB

**해결**: 해당 품번의 `OPTION_LSUPT` 값을 `L/SUPT`로 설정
- FrmPart 열기 → 해당 품번 행 찾기
- OPTION_LSUPT 컬럼: 드롭다운에서 `L/SUPT` 선택 → 저장
- **JA01~JA04 모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 변경 필요**

---

## 2. REAR (Rear Back) Part Master 설정

### 2.1 진입 방법

**방법 A**: 각 스테이션 FrmPart에서 편집 (기존 방식)
- 메인 화면 → Part 버튼 → Grid에서 편집 → 저장

**방법 B**: Part Editor 독립 프로그램 사용 (신규)
- `NX4C REAR\PartEditor\` 폴더의 실행 파일 실행
- 모든 옵션을 한눈에 보고 편집 가능

### 2.2 특징

- REAR는 **SQL Server 중앙 DB**를 사용합니다.
- 어느 스테이션에서든 한 번만 설정하면 모든 스테이션에 반영됩니다.
- DB 서버: `192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR`, DB명: `NX4C`

### 2.3 옵션 컬럼 설명

| 컬럼명 | 설명 | 가능한 값 |
|--------|------|----------|
| PartNo | 품번 (Primary Key) | 문자열 |
| PartName | 품명 | 문자열 |
| OptionPosition | LH/RH 방향 | `LH`, `RH` |
| OptionRemote | 리모컨 옵션 | True/False |
| **OptionBeltCode** | 안전대 식별코드 (신규) | 코드 문자열 또는 빈값 |
| **OptionDamper** | 댐퍼 사용여부 (신규) | `USE` (조립), `SKIP` (건너뜀) |
| Seq | 표시 순서 | 숫자 |
| Model | 모델명 | 문자열 |
| UseYN | 사용 여부 | `Y`, `N` |

### 2.4 수정 요청별 설정 방법

#### (1) R/B JA02 안전대 바코드 식별 추가

**증상**: JA02 공정에서 안전대 종류를 구분하지 않고 조립

**해결**: `OptionBeltCode` 컬럼에 식별코드 입력

| 품번 | OptionBeltCode |
|------|---------------|
| 88410-N8610NNB | `702636` |
| 88410-N8620NNB | `702636` |
| 88310-N8610NNB | `705354` |
| 88310-N8620NNB | `705354` |

- 값이 입력된 품번: JA02 공정에서 안전대 바코드 스캔 후 코드 일치 여부 검증
- 값이 비어있는 품번: 검증 없이 기존대로 진행

#### (2) R/B JA03 댐퍼 2개 품번 조립 삭제

**증상**: 특정 품번에서 댐퍼(防颤块) 조립이 불필요

**해결**: 해당 품번의 `OptionDamper` 값을 `SKIP`으로 설정
- Part Editor 또는 FrmPart에서 해당 품번 찾기
- OptionDamper 컬럼: `SKIP` 선택 → 저장
- `USE`: 댐퍼 조립 진행 (기본값)
- `SKIP`: 댐퍼 조립 건너뜀

---

## 3. SQL 스키마 업데이트 (최초 1회)

REAR의 새 옵션 컬럼을 사용하려면 SQL Server에 스키마 업데이트가 필요합니다.

1. SQL Server Management Studio 접속
2. `ALTER_TablePart.sql` 파일 실행 (NX4C REAR 폴더에 있음)
3. 또는 아래 SQL 직접 실행:

```sql
USE NX4C;
ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE';

-- 안전대 식별코드 초기 설정
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB');
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB');
```

---

## 4. 검증 체크리스트

### FRT 검증
- [ ] OE 품번의 OPTION_CARTYPE 변경 후 바코드 출력 확인
- [ ] OE 품번의 OPTION_SAB=NONE 설정 후 SAB 공정 skip 확인
- [ ] OE 품번의 OPTION_cSAB=0 설정 후 CSAB 공정 skip 확인
- [ ] 럼버서포트 4개 품번의 OPTION_LSUPT=L/SUPT 설정 후 작동 확인
- [ ] JA01~JA04 모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 설정되었는지 확인

### REAR 검증
- [ ] ALTER_TablePart.sql 실행 완료
- [ ] OptionBeltCode 초기값 설정 완료 (4개 품번)
- [ ] JA02: 벨트코드 있는 품번 스캔 시 안전대 바코드 검증 작동
- [ ] JA02: 벨트코드 없는 품번은 기존대로 정상 진행
- [ ] JA03: OptionDamper=SKIP 품번에서 댐퍼 공정 건너뜀
- [ ] JA03: OptionDamper=USE 품번에서 댐퍼 공정 정상 진행
- [ ] Part Editor 프로그램으로 조회/편집/저장 정상 동작

content.content: File created successfully at: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C_ASS_설정가이드.md

### 1.4 수정 요청별 설정 방법

**해결**: 해당 품번의 `OPTION_CARTYPE` 값을 확인/수정
- FrmPart 열기 → 해당 품번 행 찾기 → OPTION_CARTYPE 컬럼 수정 → 저장
- 예: `OE` → `NX4C` 또는 올바른 차종코드로 변경
- **JA01~JA04 모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 변경 필요**

#### (2) OE 차종 SAB/CSAB 조립 삭제

**증상**: OE 차종에서 SAB, CSAB 조립 공정이 진행됨 (불필요)

**해결**: 해당 OE 품번의 옵션 값 변경
- `OPTION_SAB` → `NONE` (SAB 조립 건너뜀)
- `OPTION_cSAB` → `0` (CSAB 조립 건너뜀)
- JA02 스테이션의 FrmPart에서 설정 (JA02가 SAB/CSAB 담당)

#### (3) 럼버서포트 4개 품번 작동 불가

**증상**: 아래 4개 품번에서 럼버서포트가 작동하지 않음
- 88310-N8AB0NNB
- 88310-N8660NNB
- 88310-N8690NNB
- 88310-N8AE0NNB

**해결**: 해당 품번의 `OPTION_LSUPT` 값을 `L/SUPT`로 설정
- FrmPart 열기 → 해당 품번 행 찾기
- OPTION_LSUPT 컬럼: 드롭다운에서 `L/SUPT` 선택 → 저장
- **JA01~JA04 모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 변경 필요**

---

## 2. REAR (Rear Back) Part Master 설정

### 2.1 진입 방법

**방법 A**: 각 스테이션 FrmPart에서 편집 (기존 방식)
- 메인 화면 → Part 버튼 → Grid에서 편집 → 저장

**방법 B**: Part Editor 독립 프로그램 사용 (신규)
- `NX4C REAR\PartEditor\` 폴더의 실행 파일 실행
- 모든 옵션을 한눈에 보고 편집 가능

### 2.2 특징

- REAR는 **SQL Server 중앙 DB**를 사용합니다.
- 어느 스테이션에서든 한 번만 설정하면 모든 스테이션에 반영됩니다.
- DB 서버: `192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR`, DB명: `NX4C`

### 2.3 옵션 컬럼 설명

| 컬럼명 | 설명 | 가능한 값 |
|--------|------|----------|
| PartNo | 품번 (Primary Key) | 문자열 |
| PartName | 품명 | 문자열 |
| OptionPosition | LH/RH 방향 | `LH`, `RH` |
| OptionRemote | 리모컨 옵션 | True/False |
| **OptionBeltCode** | 안전대 식별코드 (신규) | 코드 문자열 또는 빈값 |
| **OptionDamper** | 댐퍼 사용여부 (신규) | `USE` (조립), `SKIP` (건너뜀) |
| Seq | 표시 순서 | 숫자 |
| Model | 모델명 | 문자열 |
| UseYN | 사용 여부 | `Y`, `N` |

### 2.4 수정 요청별 설정 방법

#### (1) R/B JA02 안전대 바코드 식별 추가

**증상**: JA02 공정에서 안전대 종류를 구분하지 않고 조립

**해결**: `OptionBeltCode` 컬럼에 식별코드 입력

| 품번 | OptionBeltCode |
|------|---------------|
| 88410-N8610NNB | `702636` |
| 88410-N8620NNB | `702636` |
| 88310-N8610NNB | `705354` |
| 88310-N8620NNB | `705354` |

- 값이 입력된 품번: JA02 공정에서 안전대 바코드 스캔 후 코드 일치 여부 검증
- 값이 비어있는 품번: 검증 없이 기존대로 진행

#### (2) R/B JA03 댐퍼 2개 품번 조립 삭제

**증상**: 특정 품번에서 댐퍼(防颤块) 조립이 불필요

**해결**: 해당 품번의 `OptionDamper` 값을 `SKIP`으로 설정
- Part Editor 또는 FrmPart에서 해당 품번 찾기
- OptionDamper 컬럼: `SKIP` 선택 → 저장
- `USE`: 댐퍼 조립 진행 (기본값)
- `SKIP`: 댐퍼 조립 건너뜀

---

## 3. SQL 스키마 업데이트 (최초 1회)

REAR의 새 옵션 컬럼을 사용하려면 SQL Server에 스키마 업데이트가 필요합니다.

1. SQL Server Management Studio 접속
2. `ALTER_TablePart.sql` 파일 실행 (NX4C REAR 폴더에 있음)
3. 또는 아래 SQL 직접 실행:

```sql
USE NX4C;
ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionBeltCode NVARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '';
ALTER TABLE TablePart ADD OptionDamper NVARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USE';

-- 안전대 식별코드 초기 설정
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '702636' WHERE PartNo IN ('88410-N8610NNB', '88410-N8620NNB');
UPDATE TablePart SET OptionBeltCode = '705354' WHERE PartNo IN ('88310-N8610NNB', '88310-N8620NNB');
```

---

## 4. 검증 체크리스트

### FRT 검증
- [ ] OE 품번의 OPTION_CARTYPE 변경 후 바코드 출력 확인
- [ ] OE 품번의 OPTION_SAB=NONE 설정 후 SAB 공정 skip 확인
- [ ] OE 품번의 OPTION_cSAB=0 설정 후 CSAB 공정 skip 확인
- [ ] 럼버서포트 4개 품번의 OPTION_LSUPT=L/SUPT 설정 후 작동 확인
- [ ] JA01~JA04 모든 스테이션에서 동일하게 설정되었는지 확인

### REAR 검증
- [ ] ALTER_TablePart.sql 실행 완료
- [ ] OptionBeltCode 초기값 설정 완료 (4개 품번)
- [ ] JA02: 벨트코드 있는 품번 스캔 시 안전대 바코드 검증 작동
- [ ] JA02: 벨트코드 없는 품번은 기존대로 정상 진행
- [ ] JA03: OptionDamper=SKIP 품번에서 댐퍼 공정 건너뜀
- [ ] JA03: OptionDamper=USE 품번에서 댐퍼 공정 정상 진행
- [ ] Part Editor 프로그램으로 조회/편집/저장 정상 동작

file.content:
Imports System
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Namespace PartEditor

    Module Program

        ''' <summary>
        ''' Application entry point
        ''' </summary>
        <STAThread>
        Sub Main()
            Application.EnableVisualStyles()
            Application.SetCompatibleTextRenderingDefault(False)

            ' Global exception handlers for crash logging
            AddHandler Application.ThreadException, AddressOf OnThreadException
            AddHandler AppDomain.CurrentDomain.UnhandledException, AddressOf OnUnhandledException

            Application.Run(New FrmMain())
        End Sub

        Private Sub OnThreadException(sender As Object, e As System.Threading.ThreadExceptionEventArgs)
            LogCrash(e.Exception)
            MessageBox.Show("Unhandled error: " & e.Exception.Message, "Error",
                            MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Sub

        Private Sub OnUnhandledException(sender As Object, e As UnhandledExceptionEventArgs)
            Dim ex As Exception = TryCast(e.ExceptionObject, Exception)
            If ex IsNot Nothing Then LogCrash(ex)
        End Sub

        Private Sub LogCrash(ex As Exception)
            Try
                Dim path As String = IO.Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "crash.log")
                IO.File.AppendAllText(path,
                    $"[{DateTime.Now:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}] {ex.GetType().Name}: {ex.Message}{Environment.NewLine}{ex.StackTrace}{Environment.NewLine}")
            Catch
                ' Ignore logging failure
            End Try
        End Sub

    End Module

End Namespace

        End Sub

        ' Load all TablePart data (with optional PartNo filter)
        Private Sub LoadData()
            Try
                Dim filter As String = txtSearch.Text.Trim()
                Dim query As String = "SELECT * FROM TablePart ORDER BY LEN(PartNo), PartNo"
                If filter <> "" Then
                    query = "SELECT * FROM TablePart WHERE PartNo LIKE '%" & filter.Replace("'", "''") & "%' ORDER BY LEN(PartNo), PartNo"
                End If

                Dim conn As New OleDbConnection(CONN_STRING)
                conn.Open()
                myDataSet = New DataSet()
                myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(query, conn)
                myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "TablePart")
                conn.Close()

                dgvPart.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("TablePart")

                ' Column widths
                If dgvPart.Columns.Count > 0 Then
                    For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In dgvPart.Columns
                        col.Width = 120
                    Next
                    If dgvPart.Columns.Contains("PartNo") Then dgvPart.Columns("PartNo").Width = 160
                    If dgvPart.Columns.Contains("PartName") Then dgvPart.Columns("PartName").Width = 200
                    If dgvPart.Columns.Contains("ID") Then dgvPart.Columns("ID").Visible = False
                End If

                lblStatus.Text = "Loaded " & myDataSet.Tables("TablePart").Rows.Count & " rows."

            Catch ex As Exception
                MessageBox.Show("Load Error: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            End Try
        End Sub

        ' Save changes back to SQL Server
        Private Sub SaveData()
            Try
                If myDataAdapter Is Nothing OrElse myDataSet Is Nothing Then Return

                dgvPart.EndEdit()
                Dim builder As New OleDbCommandBuilder(myDataAdapter)
                myDataAdapter.DeleteCommand = builder.GetDeleteCommand()
                myDataAdapter.UpdateCommand = builder.GetUpdateCommand()
                myDataAdapter.InsertCommand = builder.GetInsertCommand()

                Dim updated As Integer = myDataAdapter.Update(myDataSet.Tables("TablePart"))
                builder.Dispose()

                lblStatus.Text = "Saved " & updated & " rows."
                MessageBox.Show("Save Complete. (" & updated & " rows)", "Info", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)

                ' Reload data
                myDataSet.Dispose()
                myDataAdapter.Dispose()
                LoadData()

            Catch ex As Exception
                MessageBox.Show("Save Error: " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            End Try
        End Sub

        ' Delete selected row
        Private Sub DeleteSelectedRow()
            If dgvPart.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse dgvPart.CurrentRow.IsNewRow Then Return

            Dim partNo As String = ""
            If dgvPart.CurrentRow.Cells("PartNo").Value IsNot Nothing Then
                partNo = dgvPart.CurrentRow.Cells("PartNo").Value.ToString()
            End If

            Dim result = MessageBox.Show("Delete row [" & partNo & "]?", "Confirm",
                                         MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)
            If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                dgvPart.Rows.Remove(dgvPart.CurrentRow)
                lblStatus.Text = "Row deleted. Click Save to apply."
            End If
        End Sub

        ' Button handlers
        Private Sub btnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnLoad.Click
            If myDataSet IsNot Nothing Then myDataSet.Dispose()
            If myDataAdapter IsNot Nothing Then myDataAdapter.Dispose()
            LoadData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub btnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
            SaveData()
        End Sub

        Private Sub btnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnDelete.Click
            DeleteSelectedRow()
        End Sub

        Private Sub txtSearch_KeyDown(sender As Object, e As KeyEventArgs) Handles txtSearch.KeyDown
            If e.KeyCode = Keys.Enter Then
                If myDataSet IsNot Nothing Then myDataSet.Dispose()
                If myDataAdapter IsNot Nothing Then myDataAdapter.Dispose()
                LoadData()
                e.SuppressKeyPress = True
            End If
        End Sub

    End Class

End Namespace

    27→        Private Const COL_OPT_REMOTE As String = "OptionRemote"
    28→        Private Const COL_OPT_BELT As String = "OptionBeltCode"
    29→        Private Const COL_OPT_DAMPER As String = "OptionDamper"

    48→        ''' <summary>
    49→        ''' Configure DataGridView columns: combobox columns for enum-like fields.

    55→

    69→            colPartName.Width = 180
    70→            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colPartName)

    95→            colBelt.Width = 100
    96→            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colBelt)
    97→
    98→            ' OptionDamper - combobox USE/SKIP
    99→            Dim colDamper As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
   100→            colDamper.Name = "colOptionDamper"
   101→            colDamper.HeaderText = "Damper"
   102→            colDamper.DataPropertyName = COL_OPT_DAMPER
   103→            colDamper.Items.AddRange("", "USE", "SKIP")
   104→            colDamper.Width = 75
   105→            colDamper.FlatStyle = FlatStyle.Flat
   106→            dgvParts.Columns.Add(colDamper)

   108→            ' Seq - numeric

   113→            colSeq.Width = 55

   116→            ' Model - text

   119→            colModel.HeaderText = "Model"

   127→            colUseYN.HeaderText = "UseYN"

   129→            colUseYN.Items.AddRange("", "Y", "N")
